title: AI to disrupt traditional IT services model; Indian firms must reinvent or risk decline: Kearney
description: Kearney leaders Bob Willen and Siddharth Jain say artificial intelligence is accelerating a structural shift in the global technology services industry, forcing Indian IT firms to rethink legacy outsourcing models, invest in innovation and build stronger AI-led consulting capabilities to remain competitive.

title: CCI chief raises alarm over AI opacity, algorithmic collusion
description: Competition Commission of India (CCI) Chairperson Ravneet Kaur raised alarms over the rapid rise of artificial intelligence, warning that opaque algorithms make it difficult to detect anti-competitive practices like self-preferencing and market foreclosure.

title: India needs dedicated AI law as current legal framework inadequate to tackle emerging risks: Cyber Expert Pavan Duggal

title: Lenskart to step up AI push in FY27, targets scale
description: Lenskart is pivoting to a consumer-AI company, making artificial intelligence central to its FY27 growth strategy. title: WH Prepares AI Cybersecurity Order Amid Rising Alarm Over Frontier Models
description: The White House is preparing to unveil an executive order on cybersecurity and artificial intelligence safety as early as this week, according to sources familiar with the matter, marking the Trump administration's most significant effort yet to address growing concerns over advanced AI systems, Axios reported on Wednesday.
